pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting the provided `human_insulin_gene.gb` file, which contains the exact locus, metadata, and sequence corresponding to the public NCBI GenBank record for NM_000207.3.
Verified against the agent's explicit role in the task description ('You are a translational molecular biologist...').
Standard classification accurately reflecting a task involving molecular biology and bioinformatics.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real human insulin mRNA transcript file (`human_insulin_gene.gb`) from the NCBI RefSeq database (NM_000207.3). The ground truth parameters for the UTRs are dynamically generated by extracting the CDS coordinates (bases 60-392) via regex, calculating the 5' UTR (length 59, 57.63% GC) and 3' UTR (length 73, 65.75% GC). All metadata claims have been verified against the underlying script logic and GenBank reference.
